reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Left Hilton Fuzhou yesterday. Checked in Conrad Xiamen given room high floor with some Seaview but the design of  the room has strange angular shape bed facing wall felt sandwiched rather uncomfortable.. it seems the room was not occupied for some time and not meticulously kept, items not restocked a nuisance to request for them. We expect luxury at  Conrad being quite new 5 star and most expensive among others
reviews.response: Dear Patrick, thank you for taking time to tell us about your experience. I am sorry that your stay at Hilton Fuzhou did not reach your expectation, please allow me to express my sincerest apologies. We highly concern guest's satisfaction as we enhance this in staff training. We will work on the issue you mentioned and we wish you could give us a chance to serve you better in the near future.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Nice river view. Satistified with both hardward and services. There is a mall next to hotel with a lot of restaurant. Amongst those is the famous Zheng Chun Fa Buddha Jump Over the Wall restaurant
reviews.response: Dear Guest, Thank you for choosing to stay with us! I am glad to hear that you have enjoyed your time here at Hilton Fuzhou. We are looking forward to welcome you again. Yours Sincerely！

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: nice location with a mall full of restaurants next to it. The famous Zheng Chun Fa Buddha Jump Over the Wall restauwant is just next to it. Nice river view and satisfied with both hardward and services
reviews.response:
Dear guest, 
Thank you for choosing to stay with us! We are glad to hear that you have enjoyed your time here at Hilton Fuzhou. We are looking forward to seeing you again. 
Yours Sincerely.

reviews.title: Good hotel . Poor design in depressing neighborhood
reviews.positives: Good room. Very good view . Good pool and gym . Good breakfast.
reviews.negatives: The hotel design is messy . And lack a proper lobby . The elevator system is really painful ( lobby is at the 40 floor . Then to 1 st floor . Then to parking ( 3 elevator !!!!) This CBD neighborhood is still empty and sad. Huge road . Empty shopping mall around . No charm at all. No easy access to the river front .

reviews.title: Fantastic concierge
reviews.text: Special thanks to David Huang who patiently explained to me the details of how to get to Putien from Fuzhou, and Nick Zhu who was also very helpful throughout my stay!
reviews.response:
Dear Meng, 
Thank you for choosing to stay with us! I am glad to hear that you have enjoyed your time here at Hilton Fuzhou. I will share your experience with our team members. Your recognition helps us do better. We are looking forward to welcome you again!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Amazing service and wonderful view
reviews.response: Dear Guest, Thank you for choosing to stay with us! I am glad to hear that you have enjoyed your time here at Hilton Fuzhou. The hotel is located on the bank of the Minjiang River. Each guest room can enjoy the charming cityscape and the beautiful Minjiang River. We hope that our unique environment and considerate service will leave you with unforgettable memories after your departure. We are looking forward to welcome you again. Yours Sincerely！

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.positives: The vibe

reviews.title: Good international hotel in Fuzhou
reviews.text: Fuzhou is a big bustling city, but not quite what I would call western/international (like Beijing or Shanghai) .  That said, the facilities at this hotel are clean and modern.   The staff was attentive and helpful… they spoke English when I spoke English to them.. The breakfast buffet is very good and suited for the Asian traveler, but aLeo includes what a westerner would want…  I had access to the exec lounge, which offered a light dinner/drinks/snacks.   It’s next to the river and riverside park, so views are nice, but probably need a car to get anywhere interesting.
reviews.response: Dear Guest, Thank you for choosing to stay with us! I am glad to hear that you have enjoyed your time here at Hilton Fuzhou. The hotel is located on the bank of the Minjiang River. Each guest room can enjoy the charming cityscape and the beautiful Minjiang River. We hope that our unique environment and considerate service will leave you with unforgettable memories after your departure. We are looking forward to welcome you again. Yours Sincerely！

reviews.title: Usage amount and credit card payment deposit
reviews.text: The deposit and the usage fee were calculated simultaneously. I tried to get it back the next day with a card payment, but it seems they automatically refund it. Hilton wouldn't lie, right?
reviews.response: Dear guests, thank you for choosing our stay! The deposit will be automatically refunded to your bank account within 7 working days after you check out. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions. Hope to see you again soon and make your stay a great experience again. Thank you!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, the service is very good, and the location is convenient, making it quick to reach different nearby attractions. The view of the river is very beautiful, and we were even fortunate enough to see fireworks one night!

reviews.title: 部屋から川がよく見え良かったです。
reviews.positives:
朝食の種類が多い、地下鉄の駅からも比較的近い、駅の周辺はデパートがあり、レストランもある。
ホテルの近くに7-11コンビニも有りました。
reviews.negatives:
部屋の空調が集中管理で、冷房に切れ替えられており、暖房が使えなった（夜寒かった）。
しいて言えば、朝の食堂は座り切れず、行列が出来ていました。

reviews.response: 欢迎阁下选择下榻福州三迪希尔顿酒店! 对于您提出的上网服务疑议，我们在此深表歉意。酒店针对希尔顿荣誉客会会员施行免费上网政策，我们诚挚地邀请您加入希尔顿荣誉客会，成为我们的会员，享受诸多专属礼遇。再次感谢您的评价，我们衷心期待您的再次光临，谢谢。

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 房間整潔
reviews.negatives:
前台完全不知道我預訂的情況，翻查很久才找到我的姓名，我預訂時的要求無一實現，幾經投訴才編排兩房同一樓層，房價非預訂價格，出示預約資料才說弄錯了。酒店與中介公司全無溝通，很失望的一次住宿體驗！
早餐員工少態度差，未能及時清理已用餐的餐枱，有失五星級酒店服務標準。

reviews.title: 很差的体验
reviews.text: 讲真的这家装修风格一般。服务态度，除了前台有笑脸，其他无论解决问题时候，路上遇到服务员，毫无体验可言。讲真的两句话，在福州跟自家的花园比都不一定比得过。在福州跟其他五星比，会被吊打。良心话，剩下自己看吧
reviews.response:
欢迎阁下选择下榻福州三迪希尔顿酒店! 对于此次未能收获您满意的入住体验，我们感到十分遗憾。您所指明的服务品质问题我们已收到，并且非常重视，我们会将您的反馈分享至管理团队，并进行相应的培训完善。在希尔顿，我们一直努力确保每一位宾客受到宾至如归的关爱，尊重和照顾。您的反馈将帮助我们提高并实现我们的品牌承诺。宾客的满意度对我们十分重要，我们也努力确保所有客人都享受到满意的住宿体验。再次感谢您的反馈。衷心期待阁下的再次光临，谢谢。
酒店总经理 - 梁恒

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 窗外 風景  房間 乾淨 漂亮 滿意

reviews.title: 新开酒店 装修气味还在
reviews.text: 新开的酒店，装修味道太重，配套设施还没完全完善，早餐中规中矩算过得去，行政走廊没开有些遗憾；员工态度不错，业务不够熟练，但是也算礼貌有加，值得表扬；下次还会考虑入住，当然希望这次不好的地方都能得到改善才考虑再次入住
reviews.response: 尊敬的宾客，您好！非常感谢您下榻福州三迪希尔顿酒店并花时间对我们进行点评。酒店的行政酒廊现已正式对外营业，衷心期望您的下次光临并体验行政酒廊服务。很荣幸的得知您对我们员工的服务态度感到满意，关于您对酒店配套设施及员工业务熟练程度的反馈，我们已经及时与酒店管理层进行分享并已及时弥补。再次感谢您的光临，我们衷心期待您的再次光临。谢谢。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 很不错！
reviews.response: 感谢您在百忙之中抽出时间对酒店进行点评，尤其感谢您对酒店的肯定和认可，希望我们得天独厚的环境和贴心的服务让您在离开之后仍留有久久难忘的美妙回忆。我们期待能很快再次见到您。

reviews.title: 位置佳，江景美，设施新
reviews.text:
室内设计精湛，给我留下深刻印象。面朝江景，视野很不错。
缺点：只有泳池，没有kids club（自助餐厅门口有个简易儿童设施）；没有可供租借的儿童推车；自助早餐比较普通。
reviews.response: 感谢您近期选择入住福州三迪希尔顿酒店。希望您在入住期间感受到一个充满时尚风格、提供卓越服务、保证与世界随时连通的环境，并且真正尽享“宾至如归”的奢华舒适的体验。您的意见我们已经转达相应部门，感谢您的反馈，这将帮助我们不断做得更好。

reviews.title: Comfort and convenience.
reviews.positives: Comfortable and clean. Close to 7 eleven, close to restaurants. Beautiful room.
reviews.negatives: I booked one room for 3 adults, but we were given a room with 2 single beds. We were asked if we would like to book an additional room. I am not sure where the mistake was. I clearly booked a room for 3 adults but why did I ask to book an additional room to accommodate one more person.

reviews.title: Very comfortable and enjoyable stay
reviews.positives:
Had a wonderful stay at the Hilton Fuzhou. 
The hotel facilities are very modern, and the rooms are spacious and clean, equipped with all the necessary amenities. The front desk staff was warm and friendly, making the check-in and check-out process very smooth.

Located in one of Fuzhou’s iconic skyscrapers, the hotel offers breathtaking panoramic views of the city from its upper floors. The stunning night views, showcasing the vibrant cityscape and rivers.

The location of the hotel is also convenient, with many restaurants and shopping centers nearby, making it easy to get around.  Highlight the hotel’s buffet breakfast, which offers a wide variety of delicious options—a perfect start to a great day.

reviews.title: I would go back.
reviews.positives:
friendly and helpful staff who went beyond the expected and surprised me with the extra they did, especially the housekeeping.

amazing job especially by the one, I don’t know her name, who cleaned my room 5/30. 

I was there for a wedding and before I left the room, I put on makeup and hurried out, leaving all the eyeliners and brushes out of my makeup bag and laying them on the bathroom counter/sink. 

when I came back in the afternoon, they were SO organized, with each one of them laying properly and one next to another on a clean hand towel! 

never had I had that happen to me during my travels and I was gladly overwhelmed! 

I knew the staff was a she because in the later afternoon she came to my room with the notice about construction noise, and asked me if four bottles of water she put in my room was enough. please do show my gratitude to that lady
reviews.negatives:
1. the changing room was not air-conditioned and hot/humid.
2. on my check out day 5/31 when I was half way of having breakfast, a hotel guest I didn’t know came sit at my table (it was the smallest table with two chairs) when I was away to get my third plate of food. I let him know I was sitting here and still not leaving, he continued eating his food anyway. I had the most awkward and uncomfortable time. 

my point is: hotel could use a sign that says “occupied” or something to let the guests find whether the tables are in use or not.

reviews.title: Espectacular
reviews.positives: Muy buena ubicación, el desayuno perfecto y las habitaciones hermosas. Muy buen servicio
